naturalLanguageQuery: show me the short descriptions of data security controls

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT short FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE category = 'Data Security';

naturalLanguageQuery: find controls related to incident response in organizational security

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE category = 'Organizational Security' AND "searchText" ILIKE '%incident%';

naturalLanguageQuery: how many controls are in each category

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM "allTrustControls" GROUP BY category;

naturalLanguageQuery: which team members are responsible for cloud security
show me controls and faqs about api security

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%api%' UNION ALL SELECT * FROM "allTrustFaqs" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%api%';

naturalLanguageQuery: who are the technical delivery managers and what controls are they responsible for

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short" FROM "allTeams" t JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" WHERE t."role" = 'Technical Delivery Manager';

naturalLanguageQuery: find all controls and faqs about data security

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE category = 'Data Security' UNION ALL SELECT * FROM "allTrustFaqs" WHERE category = 'Data Security';

naturalLanguageQuery: what is the average response time for the data security team

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT AVG("responseTimeHours") as average_response_time FROM "allTeams" WHERE category = 'Data Security';

naturalLanguageQuery: list controls that mention both aws and data

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%aws%' AND "searchText" ILIKE '%data%';

naturalLanguageQuery: who are active team members in organizational security

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTeams" WHERE "category" ILIKE 'Organizational Security' AND "isActive" = true;

naturalLanguageQuery: who are the security leads in the organization

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTeams" WHERE "role" ILIKE '%security%' AND ("role" ILIKE '%lead%' OR "role" ILIKE '%manager%' OR "role" ILIKE '%director%');

naturalLanguageQuery: show me all active team members related to data security or secure development

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTeams" WHERE ("category" = 'Data Security' OR "category" = 'Secure Development') AND "isActive" = true;

naturalLanguageQuery: which team members have response times less than 3 hours
find FAQs and trust controls that mention cookies or privacy

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT * FROM "allTrustFaqs" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%cookies%' OR "searchText" ILIKE '%privacy%' UNION ALL SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%cookies%' OR "searchText" ILIKE '%privacy%';

naturalLanguageQuery: show me secure development controls along with related FAQs

expectedResponse.sql: SELECT c."short", c."long", f."question", f."answer" FROM "allTrustControls" c LEFT JOIN "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category" WHERE c."category" = 'Secure Development';
